title: Avali Origin (Definitive edition)
description: Live a new Experiencie in Minecraft with the most Cutest Raptors!
body:
![Avali in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d63a9125d4527cfdf1d0441f40fa86e6fe9ab5_0.webp)

> Did you always wanted to play as an Avali in Minecraft world?, this is the time for it~
The Avali are a space Fluffy Raptors made by RyuujinZERO, they originally come from Spore, but their real Origin was starting on starbound then this make this little cute Raptors start to show in every game possible (Modding).

## Mods and Resource pack you will need:
- **Origins Mod**
- **Pekhui**
- **More Customizable Player Models (Optional)**
- **Resource Pack: Avali_resource pack**

# Avali Origin Showcase Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/q712hy-Fkw8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Note: On video description you will find Models for play as Avali.**

## Powers of the Avali Origin:
These are the positive and negative traits of the Avali Race if you choose it as your Origin in the game. It’s highly recommended to combine it with the **Avali model from Custom Player Models** provided from the video showcase for full experience.

![Avali Origin Desc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7351c356ba2f67bbaaef969595ac40991721a8b.png)

## **Positive Traits:**
- Special mid-air boost ability; you can use it up to 5 times in a row. (Primary Special ability)
- If you're holding nothing in your hand, you can glide down gently.
- You gain sprinting speed while running.
- Soft night vision.
- Good Ears, if you don't move you can hear nearby monsters/creatures. (Special Second ability)
- Mastery with bows, you deal more damage when using bows.
- Small height, you're nearly half the size of a normal player, which lets you enter 1x1 block spaces easily, and enemies using bows will have a harder time hitting you.
- Ability to jump over fences and 2-block high surfaces.
- Almost complete immunity to fall damage.
- Free Bird, you can glide like when you use Elytras!

## **Negative Traits:**
- Higher hunger requirement; using the flight ability also drains the hunger bar faster.
- x2 damage from fire, but you are inmune frozen to death.
- You can't use shields.
- You only have 7 Hearts.
- Small height, hitting enemies accurately can be harder. Getting critical hits is also somewhat difficult.
- Small height, aiming with a bow is also a bit trickier, although the damage dealt with bows is high.
- Small height, you'll take slightly increased damage from projectiles and explosions, mostly.

# Important Notes:
**I made 2 versions for this Origins which you will find in download versions:**

- **Avali Origin with Dependencie of Customizable Player Model:** This version you need to have installed the mod "Customizable player models" and use the "Avali Model" to get the Size, Jumps, Speed, etc. And has enable the command "/cpm scaling all enabled true" on the world for get all the Special Features, This version is the one i recommend make the movements and skills more amazing.

- **Avali Origin witouth Dependencie of Customizable Player Model:** This version you don't need to use the mod "Customizable Player Model" or activated the command "/cpm scaling all enabled true" to play, this version is more simple and less smooth with the movements.

The reason why im doing 2 version is because using the command "/cpm scaling all enabled true" you are forced to deal with the scales and skills from the "Mod Customizable Player Models", in case you invite a friend and it has a Model extreme powerfull broken. Plus you need to use the Avali Model to get the perks of Size, Speed, etc. With the other Version you don't need that.

For finish, all credits to "Cynadyde" who made the Avali origin and "Petrenko" for doing the Re-work of the Original work doing variety of models and the "Avali Resource pack", all this post was alloweed with his permission.
